message.content: {"items":[{"title":"ARD/ZDF Longitudinal Study: Mass Communication 2010","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4450","justification":"Nationally representative survey on media use and mass communication in Germany around 2010, covering TV, radio, internet and print media consumption."},{"title":"ARD/ZDF Longitudinal Study: Mass Communication 2015","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5971","justification":"Continuation of the German mass communication series focusing on media usage patterns in 2015, including digital and online media in Germany."},{"title":"ARD/ZDF Longitudinal Study: Mass Communication 2010 – 2015 (Trend Analyses)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5972","justification":"Trend dataset combining waves around 2010–2015 for Germany, specifically about changing media use and mass communication over the first half of the 2010s."},{"title":"ARD/ZDF-Onlinestudie 2012: Use of the Internet in Germany","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5777","justification":"Study of internet use in Germany including online media, streaming, and communication services in the early 2010s."},{"title":"ARD/ZDF-Onlinestudie 2015: Use of the Internet in Germany","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5973","justification":"German survey on online media and internet use in mid‑2010s, including news, entertainment, and social media usage."},{"title":"ARD/ZDF-Onlinestudie 2018: Use of the Internet in Germany","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA7246","justification":"Covers media‑related internet use in Germany toward the late 2010s, including video platforms, social networks, and online news."},{"title":"Reuters Institute Digital News Survey – Germany, 2013","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5685","justification":"German part of an international survey focusing on digital news consumption and online media in 2013."},{"title":"Reuters Institute Digital News Survey – Germany, 2016","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA6834","justification":"Examines how people in Germany access news via digital media, social networks, and traditional channels in the mid‑2010s."},{"title":"Reuters Institute Digital News Survey – Germany, 2018","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA7244","justification":"Late‑2010s German survey on digital news and media consumption, covering online news sites, apps, and social platforms."},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) 2013 – Campaign Media Coverage and Voter Media Use","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5703","justification":"GLES 2013 module with a strong focus on media: voter exposure to campaign coverage via TV, newspapers, and online media in Germany during the 2010s."}]}
